element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Introduction to Dr. Robotnik's robot patterns
Gate to bonus stage access (20+ rings required)
Risk/reward for collecting continues; fence mechanic teaches timing
Gateway to Special Stages; rewards exploration

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Via giant rings in hidden passageways
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: High-difficulty minigame; Chaos Emerald collection required for super forms

element_introduction_order.element: Character-specific abilities (Sonic shields vs Knuckles glide/climb)
element_introduction_order.first_appears: Act 1 of first zone, diverges by character choice
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Level navigation requires ability mastery; levels designed around character differences

element_introduction_order.element: Chaos Emeralds and Super form transformation
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Power progression gate; unlocks super speed and invulnerability

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Special Stages in Sonic & Knuckles levels (post-Sonic 3 Chaos Emeralds)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Ultimate power tier; requires both game cartridges

typical_relief_triggers: Collecting Chaos Emerald (transforms to Super form)
Slow-paced level sections with platforming over speed
typical_tension_triggers: Main boss fight at Act 2 end
Ring count pressure for bonus stage access
Fence-of-light approaching in orbit bonus stage
Character-specific ability requirements in narrow passages
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating high-speed momentum sections with precision platforming and boss encounters; relief punctuated by bonus stage access and power-up collection; escalating difficulty through character-specific level design and Emerald gating

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden passageways containing giant rings signal secret Special Stage access; higher-placed pathways and alcoves suggest exploration rewards
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Giant rings in concealed areas unlock Special Stages; passages hidden off main path reward ring collection and ability mastery

difficulty_curve.early_game: Mushroom Hill Zone introduces core mechanics (movement, rings, miniboss) at moderate difficulty; establishes character-specific abilities (Sonic jumps/shields vs Knuckles glide/climb)
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Zones 2-4 increase precision platforming demands and boss pattern complexity; Special Stage access becomes viable, introducing high-difficulty emerald collection branch
difficulty_curve.late_game: Zones 5-6 combine all mechanics with increased enemy density and complex level layouts; boss fights demand mastery of character-specific abilities; Super form progression expected
notable_spikes: First miniboss encounter (Act 1 end of Zone 1)
Special Stages (3D sphere navigation; high failure rate)
Zone 5-6 boss encounters (if Super form not obtained)
Lock-on transition to Sonic 3 & Knuckles (super emerald hunting)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 6 zones split into Act 1 (miniboss end) and Act 2 (boss end); creates rhythm of escalating challenge within zone, then reset at zone boundary
Sonic and Knuckles traverse same zones via different paths and mechanics; Sonic uses jump-based platforming and shield abilities, Knuckles uses wall-climb and glide to access alternate routes
Checkpoints reached mid-act serve as decision gates: 20+ rings required to enter bonus stage, creating risk/reward for ring management and combat avoidance
Giant rings concealed in secret passageways unlock 3D emerald collection minigames; spatial exploration and ability mastery required to find them
